text.title: Vector DB Dev Setup — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant 1.10 dev setup with docker-compose + pinned client + smoke.

example.title: dev-setup.yaml after fresh onboarding
example.code: db_kind: qdrant image_tag: "qdrant/qdrant:v1.10.0" data_volume: "./qdrant_storage" client_version: "qdrant-client==1.10.0" smoke_passed: true gitignore_entries: - "qdrant_storage/" - ".qdrant_data/" docker_compose_path: "deploy/docker-compose.dev.yml" ports: {api: 6333, grpc: 6334} smoke_result: collection_created: "smoke_test" vectors_inserted: 10 search_returned: 5 duration_ms: 87
example.note: Pinned tag (r1), volume (r2), matched client (r3), smoke passed (r4), gitignore set (r5).
